assertions.value: (Reading the ship's log|Course and remarks|What's on deck|circle back to|captain's running record|Best-practice heading)
The response begins with an ASCII art banner displayed BEFORE any explanation or workflow steps

name: two-section-show
prompt: what's on deck for this project?

assertions.value: Describes showing two labeled sections in one view: computed best-practice lifecycle steps AND the committed follow-ups backlog, querying both lifecycle-next and log-list, and treating both-empty as 'all clear'

Makes clear that free-text follow-ups are only resolved after explicit user confirmation, while linked items may auto-resolve silently, and that running a lifecycle step never happens without the user choosing it
